name: Paul Ryan
subject: Where to begin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
_****_****
Friend,

Here's what I want you to know: Because of the hard work of Republicans like you, we finally have a chance to put our country back on the right track.

Your donations, your efforts to get out the vote, and your support on Election Day for Republicans up and down the ticket are the reasons we can turn our ideas into action in 2017.

We have so much to do. For the last 8 years, the Democrats in Washington have been moving our country in the wrong direction. Their big government, top-down policies have left us a big mess to clean up.

I need to know where you think we should start. Take a few minutes and fill out this survey letting us know what areas Republicans should focus on first in 2017.

[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjczMjkzODES1&r=NDIyMzQzMzk3NzAzS0&b=0&j=OTQyOTk1NTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

We have at least two years of a united government to rebuild our military, reform our tax code, and clean up burdensome regulations. It's a big job, but thanks to your support, we have the team and the tools to do it.

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=27329381&r=NDIyMzQzMzk3NzAzS0&b=0&j=OTQyOTk1NTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

Your donations, your efforts to get out the vote, and your support on Election Day for Republicans up and down the ticket are the reasons we can turn our ideas into action in 2017. We have so much to do. For the last 8 years, the Democrats in Washington have been moving our country in the wrong direction. Their big government, top-down policies have left us a big mess to clean up. I need to know where you think we should start. Take a few minutes and fill out this survey letting us know what areas Republicans should focus on first in 2017. We have at least two years of a united government to rebuild our military, reform our tax code, and clean up burdensome regulations. It's a big job, but thanks to your support, we have the team and the tools to do it. Thank you, Paul Ryan Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: Tyler Foote
subject: Are you coming?
body:
Hey Peter - I'm happy to announce we finalized our bus routes for the 2017 Lobby Day, and sent invitations to three very big speakers...
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter - I'm happy to announce we finalized our bus pick-up locations (see below) for the 2017 Lobby Day, and sent invitations to three very big speakers...
[
](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a5ccc9e226915f673ce917cdf8dbd1b23dd6b9f22608aefdfecc4363b33a451b18)I hope you will hop aboard the bus and join invited speakers like Ed Gillespie, Supervisor Corey Stewart, and Senator Frank Wagner. They, along with 200 hundred fellow freedom fighters, are going to tell our lawmakers to cut spending, lower our taxes, and Build the Path to Prosperity in our Commonwealth.
**2017 AFP Lobby Day **Building the Path to Prosperity in Virginia
****Monday, January 16th (MLK Holiday) ****
9 AM to 2 PM****
Hilton Garden Inn ****
501 E Broad Street in Richmond __**
Invited Speakers:**
Ed Gillespie
Supervisor Corey Stewart
Senator Frank Wagner __**[
RSVP today
](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a5b28f1f2fa631187e5aec570b7608cf419b2d6f74641ee22d450a05592d062d3a "RSVP today")Bus locations available on the link and below. **
You don't have to be an experienced policy advocate to be successful: AFP will train you and provide handouts, talking points, and lunch, as well as set up all meetings. Our _free_ bus transportation will bring you to Richmond and back.

Our buses will pick up freedom fighters from the following cities: Virginia Beach, Yorktown, Winchester, Harrisonburg, Charlottesville, Bristol, Christiansburg, Daleville, Lynchburg, Fredricksburg, Woodbridge, Sterling, and Fairfax.

Our Commonwealth's future is in our hands. Don't miss the opportunity to make a difference and [Build the Path to Prosperity](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a5ccc9e226915f673ce917cdf8dbd1b23dd6b9f22608aefdfecc4363b33a451b18 "Build the Path to Prosperity").

Sincerely,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

P.S. Remember that elections matter, but it doesn't stop there. We have to remind politicians that we are watching, and expect them to do the right thing. [Joining us](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a582183e57b5f4e0f720634ca4d8f11056c026021675e4ed3629895931140f93ec "Joining us") for Lobby Day is your opportunity to tell your state leaders that [you are watching ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a5c27c993384974464ca75da4efa3ddaf3ca7eed29b1fe3ef1048399ed271ee0c3 "you are watching") \- and will hold them accountable.**[****](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a561184621dc1a596cd05fb9177c75783732065fb24e0a8936e6f540bf162c48ed)**
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=8b1e8f09153513a57833992880486e5f43f66b00b861e58336d94997d635b23bfd1a1735b9e6c5ec)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Activate your Inaugural Membership for the 2017 year. | Friend, on January 20th I will be sworn in as the 45th President of the United States of America, and it’s all because of your help during the last year. We didn’t just win an election, we started a movement. Now we must continue what we started and keep winning. Which is why I have asked my team to create this 2017 Inaugural Membership Card, embossed in your name -- and I hope you will carry it with pride, knowing you are the backbone of our movement.
Taking on and dismantling the status quo is no easy task. We must remain vigilant. Please accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership Card with a generous contribution of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. I want you to recommit to our cause today because you are one of the proud Americans who stood by my side when others would not. The first 100 days of our new American government will set the stage for our entire presidency. The world will be watching to see if America can once again be governed by a free and patriotic people. Democrats, the media, and the special interests who tried to take down our movement will spend the next four years fighting us every step of the way. But we will continue to stand our ground and fight back, just as we did in 2016. Together you and I will prove that America will once again be a country OF, FOR, and BY the people. Friend, your contribution today will help us highlight how our America First Agenda will put our great country back on the right track. Please accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership Card with a generous contribution of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President-Elect of the United States P.S. On January 20, 2017, it will be my honor to start working for you, for our country, and begin the long journey to Make America Great Again! I hope you will accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership and help me today. ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP Please accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership Card with a generous contribution of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba2VaBAF02dCGpWgaYH6DRMN6aaaaBQPyBMFFTJya?m=-@uA0-0&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=j&p=&z=t-tBtC21j2ex2qfimomzSt2uWuTGUijl2zuGtB2lb12rXk21212pXGWGt&121 Please accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership Card with a generous contribution of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba2VaBAF02dCGpWgaYH6DRMN6aaaaBQPyBMFFTJya?m=-@uA0-0&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=k&p=&z=t-tBtC21j2ex2qfimomzSt2uWuTGUijl2zuGtB2lb12rXk21212pXGWGt&121 I hope you will accept your 2017 Inaugural Membership and help me today. ------------------------------------------------------------------------ http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba2VaBAF02dCGpWgaYH6DRMN6aaaaBQPyBMFFTJya?m=-@uA0-0&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=l&p=&z=t-tBtC21j2ex2qfimomzSt2uWuTGUijl2zuGtB2lb12rXk21212pXGWGt&121 ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP ---------------------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba2VaBAF02dCGpWgaYH6DRMN6aaaaBQPyBMFFTJya?m=-@uA0-0&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=m&p=&z=t-tBtC21j2ex2qfimomzSt2uWuTGUijl2zuGtB2lb12rXk21212pXGWGt&121 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email Unsubscribe ----------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ediba2VaBAF02dCGpWgaYH6DRMN6aaaaBQPyBMFFTJya?m=-@uA0-0&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=n&p= email ----- mailto:unsubscribe@gop.com?Subject=Unsubscribe%20

name: Governor Steve Bullock
subject: Save the Date for the 2017 Inaugural Ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee
body:
Dear Friend,

My family, Lt. Governor Mike Cooney, and I invite you join us on January 28th for a celebration of Montana at the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball in Helena, Montana. The Kids Inaugural Ball will be held the night before on January 27th.

Please visit [stevebullock.com/ball/](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YG%2FY%2BYhFpSslzI06%2BffU6hWElT0bQAEb) for event details. Tickets will be on sale on the Ball website starting January 2nd, and Ball updates will be posted online.

Best,
Steve Bullock

Paid for by the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee
Post Office Box 1934, Helena, MT 59624
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)
clean_body: Dear Friend, My family, Lt. Governor Mike Cooney, and I invite you join us on January 28th for a celebration of Montana at the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball in Helena, Montana. The Kids Inaugural Ball will be held the night before on January 27th. Please visit for event details. Tickets will be on sale on the Ball website starting January 2nd, and Ball updates will be posted online. Best, Steve Bullock Paid for by the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee Post Office Box 1934, Helena, MT 59624

name: JUST IN (via DSCC)
subject: NBC just dropped a bombshell: [Russia]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
After the CIA concluded Russia's election interference (and their end goal of helping Donald Trump win) we thought this unsettling saga couldn't get worse. But then... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d02f/3193893617/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161215-JustInDS-ProsHV")
---
_**NBC News BOMBSHELL: "Putin personally involved in U.S. election hack"**_
[**This is the last straw! Demand an independent investigation NOW >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d02f/3193893617/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161215-JustInDS-ProsHV")
Friend -- After the CIA concluded that Russia interfered in our elections with the end goal of aiding Donald Trump, we thought this unsettling saga couldn't get worse.

But now, NBC is reporting that _Vladimir Putin himself_ "became personally involved in the covert Russian campaign" to hack Democratic institutions and put Trump in the White House!

We've never seen anything like this, Friend. Putin's personal involvement takes this scandal into uncharted territory -- **and as Americans, it 's on us to demand immediate answers.**

[**ADD YOUR NAME: Join Democrats in calling for a swift and independent Senate investigation into Russia 's hacking >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d02f/3193893617/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161215-JustInDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Demand an Independent Investigation** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d02f/3193893617/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161215-JustInDS-ProsHV")

Thanks for keeping up the pressure on this critical issue,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-investigate?refcode=DPE-20161215-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d029/3193893617/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d028/3193893617/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee8d/2b07114c/40e1f165/7368d02b/3193893617/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: ALERT (via FlaDems.com)
subject: the "victory tour" is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| **ALERT: Trump in Florida Friday as part of his "victory tour"
[**RAPID RESPONSE NEEDED: Give $5 now so Florida Democrats can fight back!**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-trump-victory-tour?refcode=em121516&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+RAPID+RESPONSE+NEEDED+Give+ask+now+so+Fl&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")**
Friend -- Trump is almost finished assembling his mega-wealthy cabinet picks, and now he's bringing his "victory tour" to Orlando tomorrow.

But he's just trying to hide that he lost the popular vote and that his cabinet is full of extreme anti-climate change, pro-Russia picks.

Listen, we need to be ready to fight back against Trump, and that fight starts NOW.

**[That's why we need 250 donors to step up for our Rapid Response Fund before Trump takes the stage Friday night. Give now to show we won't be backing down in 2017!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-trump-victory-tour?refcode=em121516&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+250+donors+to+ste&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")**

_If you've saved your payment information in ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Fight back against Trump - $10](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b3cd/1a5213b3/75931238/718bc732/3207815827/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-trump-victory-tour?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em121516&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Fight+back+against+Trump++ask&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")

name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: Update: Russia's involvement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
The CIA's recent finding about Russian government sponsored intervention in our Presidential election to defeat Hillary Clinton is a bombshell. Transparency has never been more important. | Friend, last night news broke that U.S. intelligence officials now believe that Russian President Vladimir Putin was personally involved in the covert campaign to interfere in the U.S. presidential election.

There is too much at stake. Members of the Electoral College deserve a full intelligence briefing on the extent of Russia's impact on our elections. **[Add your name right now and demand transparency before we formally elect our next president.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979fb5/2281936846/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+right+now+and+demand+trans&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")**

_Begin Forwarded Message:_
> Friend,
>
> The CIA's recent finding about the Russian government sponsored intervention in our Presidential election to defeat Hillary Clinton is a bombshell. Transparency has never been more important.
>
> That's why this week a bipartisan group of Congressional leaders sent a letter to the Director of National Intelligence demanding that members of the Electoral College receive an intelligence briefing on the extent of Russia's impact on our elections.
>
> **[Please add your name to stand with us and demand transparency before we formally elect our next president.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979fb2/2281936846/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+to+stand+with+us+an&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979fb3/2281936846/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516") Friend, next week the Electoral College will close the book on the 2016 election. This normally pro forma process has taken on new meaning after the CIA's finding on Russian intervention. Before Electors vote on December 19th, they have the right to see the evidence collected by the CIA on Russia's actions.
>
> Our nation is too divided to allow any questions to remain about the legitimacy of the 2016 election and our new president.
>
> Friend, add your name right now to demand that the Electoral College have the opportunity to receive a CIA briefing before they meet to formally elect President-elect Trump:
> **[http://action.vanhollen.org/Stand-Up-For-Transparency](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979fb0/2281936846/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/Stand-Up-For-Transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+httpactionvanhollenorgStandUpForTranspar&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")**
>
> Thank you for acting,
>
> Team Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979fb1/2281936846/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4b/70cdc2ba/473b8f16/3979e4e/2281936846/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em121516&source=em121516") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Tackling challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
My proposal would fully fund public education -- I need your support to make it a reality. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwNjIyMzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MTM5NjA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- We know what makes Washington great. One of the nation's most vibrant economies, a diverse and entrepreneurial citizenry, world-class research universities, and spectacular natural resources. But I ran for reelection this year because, as great as our state is, I knew we had a lot of important work ahead of us. So right here and right now, we must tackle the challenges that will define our state for generations to come. We're headed into the next legislative session and a two-year budget cycle -- this moment demands boldness and vision, especially when it comes to how we fund our education system. I'm writing to you, friend, as someone who stood with me during my reelection, because I need your help once again. From the divided legislature we face here in Washington, to the national conservative headwinds led by President-elect Trump, I know the next chapter of our work will be a tough fight. [**I unveiled a plan to fully fund public education for the first time in decades, boost efforts to recruit quality teachers, and fund proven strategies for helping students succeed. If you agree with my plan, I need you to share your support with your friends and family right away!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwNjIyMzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MTM5NjA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) We face an opportunity -- and an obligation -- in this upcoming session not just to put more money into the system we already have, but to invest in the kind of education system all our children deserve. That's why my proposal includes new funding for K-12 schools to boost spending to 50 percent of the state's budget for the first time in more than 30 years. And it does it all without increasing property taxes. In fact, every district would receive more money from the state, and ultimately local property taxes would be reduced for more than three-fourths of households and businesses statewide. We owe our kids and parents more than the status quo. We owe all one million of our public school children a quality teacher in the classroom and access to the programs and services we know they need, whether it's tutoring, counseling, or mentoring -- If you agree, share support today: | [**SHARE YOUR SUPPORT »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTAwNjIyMzIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MTM5NjA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I know getting this done will be a heavy lift. The legislature is sure to come up with their own ideas and I welcome that. But this is the moment to get it done. And having you by my side right now is a big part of the political, progressive power I need to help push my proposal forward. So thanks for standing with me.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10062232&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA2MTM5NjA1NwS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved, 2016.
PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://jayinslee.com/privacy) | | | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---

One of the nation's most vibrant economies, a diverse and entrepreneurial citizenry, world-class research universities, and spectacular natural resources. But I ran for reelection this year because, as great as our state is, I knew we had a lot of important work ahead of us. So right here and right now, we must tackle the challenges that will define our state for generations to come. We're headed into the next legislative session and a two-year budget cycle -- this moment demands boldness and vision, especially when it comes to how we fund our education system. I'm writing to you, friend, as someone who stood with me during my reelection, because I need your help once again. From the divided legislature we face here in Washington, to the national conservative headwinds led by President-elect Trump, I know the next chapter of our work will be a tough fight. We face an opportunity -- and an obligation -- in this upcoming session not just to put more money into the system we already have, but to invest in the kind of education system all our children deserve. That's why my proposal includes new funding for K-12 schools to boost spending to 50 percent of the state's budget for the first time in more than 30 years. And it does it all without increasing property taxes. In fact, every district would receive more money from the state, and ultimately local property taxes would be reduced for more than three-fourths of households and businesses statewide. We owe our kids and parents more than the status quo. We owe all one million of our public school children a quality teacher in the classroom and access to the programs and services we know they need, whether it's tutoring, counseling, or mentoring -- If you agree, share support today: | I know getting this done will be a heavy lift. The legislature is sure to come up with their own ideas and I welcome that. But this is the moment to get it done. And having you by my side right now is a big part of the political, progressive power I need to help push my proposal forward. So thanks for standing with me. name: add-your-name@dscc.org
subject: This is unprecedented, Friend [Trump]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Despite major concern over his unprecedented web of potential conflicts, Donald Trump REFUSES to explain how he'll keep his business dealings out of the White House... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37f/3558235277/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-conflicts?source=PT-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")
---
_**BREAKING: Senate Democrats HAMMER Trump over his conflicts of interest!**_
[**Add your name to join the fight >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37f/3558235277/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-conflicts?source=PT-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")
We're in disbelief, Friend.

Despite concerns over his unprecedented web of potential conflicts, **Donald Trump REFUSES to explain how he 'll keep his business dealings out of the White House. **Instead, he's hanging out with Kanye West!

And Senate Democrats aren't having ANY of it. They just announced a bill that would FORCE Trump to divest all assets that would pose a conflict of interest -- or face impeachment! **But with the inauguration looming, this could be our only shot to hold him accountable!**

[**We have to act now, Friend. Add your name to help Democrats ramp up this critical fight >> **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37f/3558235277/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-conflicts?source=PT-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Stop Trump 's conflicts of interest**: [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37f/3558235277/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-conflicts?source=PT-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

Lest we forget, this was _supposed_ to be the day Trump explained his plans to avoid conflicts of interest. **If we don 't hold his feet to the fire, he'll be free to profit from his office!**

[**And that 's UNACCEPTABLE behavior for the next President of the United States. So don't wait, Friend -- sign on and help Democrats keep the pressure on Trump >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37f/3558235277/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-conflicts?source=PT-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-trump-conflicts?refcode=DPE-20161215-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d379/3558235277/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d378/3558235277/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee95/2b07114c/40f3e48a/7368d37b/3558235277/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here.
It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bfe/2fde7c66/43add08d/1569229f/972344962/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, On November 8th, North Carolinians rejected the partisan bickering and political games that we've seen out of Raleigh during the last four years. But today, Republican legislators are taking unprecedented action -- and it goes beyond just their normal partisan games. This could hurt North Carolinians for years to come. **[It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bfe/2fde7c66/43add08d/1569229f/972344962/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** I am ready now to get to work to move our state forward and fulfill my pledge to make North Carolina a state that works for everyone. With a special election coming next year -- one where dozens of seats could be up for grabs -- we need to build public pressure to show Republican legislators we'll hold them accountable if they proceed with their plan. **[Sign the petition today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bfe/2fde7c66/43add08d/1569229f/972344962/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for your support, Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bfe/2fde7c66/43add08d/1569229f/972344962/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-enough-is-enough?utm_campaign=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16161215enoughadvgqfulrc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina

clean_body: It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here. It's time to stand up and let these legislators know that North Carolinians are sick and tired of their political games. Add your name here. | "" Friends, On November 8th, North Carolinians rejected the partisan bickering and political games that we've seen out of Raleigh during the last four years. But today, Republican legislators are taking unprecedented action -- and it goes beyond just their normal partisan games. This could hurt North Carolinians for years to come. "" I am ready now to get to work to move our state forward and fulfill my pledge to make North Carolina a state that works for everyone. With a special election coming next year -- one where dozens of seats could be up for grabs -- we need to build public pressure to show Republican legislators we'll hold them accountable if they proceed with their plan. "" Thanks for your support, Roy | | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 10587 Raleigh NC 27605 United States
